channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Yamamoto outduels Darvish in historic matchup as Dodgers beat Padres 2-0 to reach NLCS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers shelled out $1 billion for Japanese talent in the offseason and it's paying off in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Padres muster no offense to support Yu Darvish's inspired pitching in NLDS loss to Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Yu Darvish tapped the “PS” patch on his uniform and then went to work on the way to an inspired performance. Yet, try as he might, Darvish’s stellar outing in memory of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler was not enough to overcome the Los Angeles Dodgers on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shohei Ohtani wins first career MLB playoff series as Dodgers beat Padres in historic game
item.description: With a tight 2-0 win over the San Diego Padres in Game 5 at home on Friday, the Dodgers won their first playoff series of the current postseason format.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kucherov scores go-ahead goal, two empty-netters to push Lightning past Hurricanes in season opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov had a third-period hat trick to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Carolina Hurricanes 4-1 in Friday night's season opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: WNBA has just 1 Black head coach but more could come from a pool of strong assistants in the league
item.description: The WNBA has been praised in the past as a leader for its diversity hiring practices. That hasn't changed, but some things have. At the end of the 2022 season, half of the 12 head coaches in the league were Black.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will return to practice for the 1st time since he was shot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall is set to return to practice next week for the first time since he was shot in the chest in a robbery attempt nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Dodgers will start Yamamoto against San Diego's Darvish in winner-take-all Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani will get his wish to see Los Angeles Dodgers teammate Yoshinobu Yamamoto face off against San Diego's Yu Darvish in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Fruita Softball wins 13th straight to take home Southwestern League title
item.description: Attention Colorado high school softball teams: you do not want to see the Fruita Monument Wildcats right now.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Utah HC wins overtime thriller over Islanders, 5-4
item.description: LONG ISLAND, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - In its first ever road game, the Utah Hockey Club proved to be extremely resilient. Dylan Guenther scored his second goal at 2:18 of overtime, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-4 win against the New York Islanders at UBS Arena on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giancarlo Stanton hits go-ahead homer in the eighth, Yankees beat Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of the ALDS
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Giancarlo Stanton hit a go-ahead homer in the eighth inning amid a battle of bullpens, and the New York Yankees beat the Kansas City Royals 3-2 on Wednesday night in Game 3 of their AL Division Series at Kauffman Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: SoFi Stadium awarded 2025, 2027 Concacaf Nations League finals
item.description: Los Angeles is set to host not one, but two more significant soccer matchups, including one next year. SoFi Stadium will be the site of the next two Concacaf Nations League Finals in 2025 and 2027, officials announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Ahead of team's game in London, Bears president says he remains steadfast on proceeding with plans for new lakefront stadium
item.description: WARE, England (AP) — The Bears remain focused on the city’s lakefront as the location for a nearly $5 billion stadium development project, team president and CEO Kevin Warren reiterated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Mets postseason tickets outsell Yankees on StubHub
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The Mets and Yankees are both looking to make a run this postseason, but the Amazins are selling more tickets than the Bronx Bombers, according to StubHub. The Mets-Phillies National League Division Series was the best-selling series of the 2024 postseason on StubHub.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Whittingham not ready to hand keys over to Wilson yet
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With so much uncertainty as to when Cam Rising will be able to return at quarterback for the Utah football team, is there a point when head coach Kyle Whittingham will move on from Rising and hand the keys to the offense over to freshman Isaac Wilson? "There is
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Muggers ripped watch off Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler's arm, police say
item.description:
Police in California say thieves surrounded Los Angeles Dodgers starting pitcher Walker Buehler last month and ripped a pricey watch off his arm.
Police say the victims were all targets of organized groups who steal high-end watches in large crowds during events.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Where to watch Padres vs. Dodgers NLDS Game 3
item.description: The San Diego Padres and the Los Angeles Dodgers will meet again in Game 3 of the best-of-five National League Division Series Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Padres urge fans to 'stay classy'
item.description: San Diego Padres management is asking fans to demonstrate good behavior as the contentious National League Division Series shifts from Dodger Stadium to Petco Park on Tuesday, tied at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Dodgers pitcher reportedly robbed of luxury watch at Southern California racetrack
item.description: Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler was reportedly robbed of a luxury watch at a horse racing track in what appeared to be a grand theft spree perpetrated by multiple organized groups.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Chicago Fire FC names Gregg Berhalter, former U.S. Men's National Team coach, as director of football and head coach
item.description: CHICAGO — Chicago Fire FC has hired former U.S. Men's National Soccer Team head coach Gregg Berhalter as its head coach and director of football, the Major League Soccer team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Padres return to Petco Park in NLDS: What to know before you go
item.description: San Diego Padres fans are ecstatic to welcome back their team to Petco Park for games three and four of the National League Division Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Taylor Swift is back to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs with Eras Tour soon to resume
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Taylor Swift was back at Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night to see her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the Kansas City Chiefs play the New Orleans Saints after the pop superstar had missed the team's previous two games on the road.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tossed balls from stands, apparently aimed at Profar, interrupt Padres' win in NLDS Game 2
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tempers flared on the field and in the stands at Dodger Stadium, with rowdy fans tossing baseballs, apparently at San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar, and then trash that caused a 12-minute wait between pitches during the seventh inning of the Padres' 10-2 win in NL Division S
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres look to rebound in game 2 of NLDS against Dodgers
item.description: Photos: The San Diego Padres are facing off against the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 2 of the NL Division Series on Sunday, with Yu Darvish starting for the Padres.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers becomes the 9th NFL player to throw for 60,000 yards
item.description: Aaron Rodgers reached another milestone in his stellar career on Sunday by becoming just the ninth player in NFL history to throw for 60,000 yards in regular-season games.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Vanderbilt takes down No. 1 Alabama 40-35 in historic college football victory
item.description: Fans of the Vanderbilt Commodores danced onto the field, jumping up and down as they tore down a goal post, carried it out of the stadium and rang out sweet sounds of victory.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, Fox 5
